findings.label: invalid-row
findings.issue: Value is not a syntactically valid numeric OID.

recommendations: Normalize or remove 1 invalid OID value(s) before publishing an asset inventory.
Review OIDs without an OID-base sitemap match; they may be internal arcs, stale values, or require another registry source.

action_plan.title: Correct invalid OID values
action_plan.action: Fix malformed values before using the inventory as audit or integration evidence.

action_plan.title: Review unmatched valid OIDs against internal registries
action_plan.action: Confirm whether each unmatched OID is internal, deprecated, or covered by a registry not present in this package.

action_plan.title: Preserve evidence-ready public registry mappings
action_plan.action: Keep source URLs and enterprise mappings with the asset record for future review.
